reason: The preregistered independent test atlas with every doubled external spin restricted to {5,6} contains zero carriers having exactly two admissible channels in both declared pairings.
next_obligation: Create a new preregistration whose test class contains at least one new doubled-spin label 5 or 6 while remaining disjoint from all training representation families.
evidence_rule: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
